text.title: Product Launch Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding Product Launch. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Launch progresses through pre-launch / launch-day / post-launch gates; each gate has an explicit go/no-go check.
rule.rationale: Launch progresses through pre-launch / launch-day / post-launch gates; each gate has an explicit go/no-go check.

rule.statement: Audience is segmented (warm list, cold list, channel partners); messaging and timing differ per segment.
rule.rationale: Audience is segmented (warm list, cold list, channel partners); messaging and timing differ per segment.

rule.statement: Rollback plan exists and is rehearsed before launch day; no plan = no launch.
rule.rationale: Rollback plan exists and is rehearsed before launch day; no plan = no launch.

rule.statement: Launch monitors (errors, signups, revenue, support volume) armed before announcement; no monitor = no launch.
rule.rationale: Launch monitors (errors, signups, revenue, support volume) armed before announcement; no monitor = no launch.

rule.statement: Post-launch review at +14 days emits scale / hold / rollback; no review window = no launch.
rule.rationale: Post-launch review at +14 days emits scale / hold / rollback; no review window = no launch.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-product-launch.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
